title: masdevallia copiosa
intro: Masdevallia copiosa is a species of orchid, commonly known as the "abundant masdevallia" due to its profuse flowering habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Masdevallia copiosa are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Masdevallia copiosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine in South America, particularly in Peru and Ecuador.
